steps.title: Initial Setup/Scanning
steps.instruction: Use CeWL to crawl target website and generate context-specific wordlist
steps.tip: Start with the most reliable information source for custom wordlist generation
steps.expected_output: Wordlist containing target website words and potential password patterns

steps.title: Data Collection/Configuration
steps.instruction: Manually add company name variations and brand-related terms
steps.tip: Organize data systematically to avoid duplicates and ensure coverage
steps.expected_output: Extended wordlist including company-specific terminology and variations

steps.title: Analysis/Enumeration
steps.instruction: Add date patterns like seasons, years, and company-specific dates
steps.tip: Look for patterns and correlations in collected data
steps.expected_output: Wordlist including common date-based password patterns

steps.title: Advanced Technique/Filtering
steps.instruction: Use cupp (Common User Passwords Profiler) for targeted wordlist generation
steps.tip: Use multiple techniques to increase coverage and accuracy
steps.expected_output: Cupp-generated wordlist based on personal information when available

steps.title: Correlation/Testing
steps.instruction: Combine multiple wordlist sources and remove duplicates
steps.tip: Validate findings across different tools and methods
steps.expected_output: Consolidated custom wordlist ready for cracking attempts

steps.title: Validation/Exploitation
steps.instruction: Apply password mutation rules to expand wordlist coverage
steps.expected_output: Rule-enhanced wordlist with uppercase, numbers, and symbol variations

steps.title: Documentation/Reporting
steps.instruction: Compare effectiveness of custom wordlist against generic wordlists
steps.tip: Review all findings before compilation for accuracy and completeness
steps.expected_output: Performance comparison showing custom wordlist improvement over generic options
